intro: Mandurah Swimming Club coaches and committee review upcoming meets and decide which to target as a club. We encourage all swimmers to work towards competing at swim meets. Coaches attend target meets to support swimmers. Discuss entries with your coach before registering.
pennantNote: Swimmers intending to nominate for Country Pennants have until (and including) Country Championships to obtain their fastest time for the season, which determines the squad.
meets: Hancock Prospecting State Championships (Senior) 19th to 22nd December
Hancock Prospecting State Relays (Junior & Seniors) 23rd December
Swimming WA Country Championships 2nd to 4th January 2026
SWA National Prep Meet (Junior Challenge) - 14th & 15th February
2026 Country Pennants - Karratha - 28th February to 1st March
Aqua Technics WA Junior Championships - 27th to 29th March
